Footer.rights: © {year} Merit Luxury Wears Limited. All Rights Reserved.

Hero.headline: Redefining the Modern Kaftan
Hero.subheadline: Precision tailoring meets timeless elegance — a Navy & Silver study in restraint, crafted for the discerning modernist.
Hero.atelierNote: “Quiet luxury is not the absence of detail — it is the discipline of the right detail.”

Home.lookbookDesc: Photographed at dawn in the marble courtyards of Marina, Lagos. A study in stillness — the kaftan reframed as architecture, the wearer as monument.
Home.focusDesc: A rotating curation of new arrivals and atelier favourites.
Home.emptyProducts: Configure Supabase & add products in the admin to populate this gallery.
Home.pillar1Desc: Hand-cut, hand-stitched. Each garment passes through a single tailor — start to finish.
Home.pillar2Desc: Italian wools, Aso-oke from Iseyin, sterling-thread embroidery sourced from family looms.
Home.pillar3Desc: Concierge dispatch within 48 hours. International orders handled with insured customs clearance.
Home.founderQuote: “We did not build Merit Wears to chase trends. We built it for the people who knows precisely who they are — and dresses for the decade ahead, not the season behind. Every stitch in this house carries a name, a hand, a history. Thank you for wearing our work.”
Home.founderRole: Founder & CEO, Merit Luxury Wears Limited
Home.codaDesc: A heritage rooted in craftsmanship, distilled into a contemporary uniform of restraint, depth, and effortless elegance. We do not chase the season — we outlast it.
